name: Veal Chops with Mushroom-Tarragon Cream
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound large fresh mushrooms (shitake or oyster), quartered
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heavy-bottomed skillet or sauté pan.
2. Add the veal chops and brown lightly over medium-high heat, about 5 minutes on each side.
3. Add the mushrooms and stir until they take on color.
4. Add the wine and stock, then simmer uncovered for 20 minutes. The veal should have a pink center when cooked through.
5. Remove the chops to a warm plate and cover.
6. Reduce the sauce over high heat until only 1/3 cup remains.
7. Stir in the cream and cook over medium-high heat until the sauce has the consistency of heavy cream.
8. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
9. Add chopped tarragon, parsley, or thyme if desired.
10. Pour the sauce over the chops and serve immediately.
